name: Table
description: Data table (Figma 541:4024, component set 474:1795) on a gray.0 surface with gray.10 left-aligned headers. Wraps native table semantics: horizon (base) keeps only row rules for list-like reading, grid draws a bordered radius-8 frame with per-cell rules for dense comparison. Row states: normal, hover (gray.5), pressed (gray.10), disabled (gray.10 with muted text). The checkbox prop injects the design's selection column: a select-all header box (indeterminate on partial selection) plus per-row boxes, marking selected rows with data-selected.

slots.name: tbody
slots.description: Body rows: native tbody/tr/td markup. Mark unavailable rows with data-disabled. Cells align left by default (plain text, text+chip); data-align=center for buttons/a lone chip/audio, data-align=right (with tabular numbers) for counts, dates, amounts, percents.

props.name: checkbox
props.description: Checkbox selection column (Figma): select-all header + per-row boxes; selected rows get data-selected. Pointer sugar on top: clicking a row toggles it, and dragging along the checkbox column range-selects following the anchor row's toggle direction (mouse/pen; the checkboxes stay the accessible controls).

props.name: defaultSelected
props.description: Initially selected tbody row indexes (0-based) when checkbox is on.

props.name: onSelectionChange
props.description: Fires with the selected row indexes whenever the selection changes.

limitations: Ships as podo-table CSS classes on native table markup; a shadow-DOM element would break table semantics.
No checkbox prop: compose the selection column with podo-checkbox cells.
No checkbox prop: compose the selection column with Checkbox cells (SSR).
React Native has no table layout; use FlatList/SectionList.

accessibility.focusManagement: Interactive cells manage their own focus.
